The '''GRS-600''', known commonly as a '''replar splint''', was a field splint manufactured by [[Xarnin Medical Technologies]]. It created a miniature suspension field that immobilized the [[Limb/Legends|limb]] and relieved pressure on a damaged [[Bone/Legends|bone]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]'' {{1stm}}
